page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 64 vCPUs. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute resources without resource contention from hyperthreading.

The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This high memory density positions the instance for memory-intensive operations. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It also lacks dedicated GPU hardware accelerators. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating data transfer between the instance and external storage or network resources.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory capacity offer a dense resource profile for workloads requiring large memory footprints without GPU acceleration. Tradeoffs include the absence of local NVMe storage and the lack of hyperthreading, which limits concurrent thread execution compared to multi-threaded core configurations but provides predictable single-threaded performance per core. This instance is configured for workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale data caching, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. It provides 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor with a dedicated CPU allocation and 1 thread per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, offering predictable compute performance due to its non-hyperthreaded, dedicated core configuration. It is suitable for in-memory databases, large-scale data caching, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance with dedicated physical cores and high memory density for demanding enterprise and database workloads.
